title: caladenia attingens subsp. effusa
intro: Caladenia attingens subsp. effusa is a rare and critically endangered orchid species native to Western Australia. This plant, also known as the "effuse spider orchid," is a type of terrestrial orchid characterized by its small, white flowers and long, thin leaves. The medicinal properties of Caladenia attingens subsp. effusa are not well-documented, but it is believed to have some antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may provide health benefits such as wound healing and reduced inflammation. However, due to its rarity and endangered status, there is limited information available on herbal preparations or commercial uses of this plant.
